channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Playing by the rules of AI
item.description: The Fast Company Impact Council is a private membership community of influential leaders, experts, executives, and entrepreneurs who share their insights with our audience. Members pay annual membership dues for access to peer learning and thought leadership opportunities, events and more.
item.dc:creator: Juan Orlandini, Fast Company

item.title: This AI trend lets TikTok users relive history’s best—and worst—moments
item.description: Ever wondered what it would be like to wake up in Pompei on eruption day? How about how it would have felt to be a passenger on the Titanic? Now you don’t need to.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Fortinet speeds threat detection with improved FortiAnalyzer
item.description: Fortinet has reinforced its FortiAnalyzer security analytics and log management platform with capabilities that enhance enterprise threat detection and automate incident response. FortiAnalyzer securely collects logs from Fortinet devices such as FortiGate firewalls and endpoint security agents.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Coinbase lays out legislation wish list
item.description: Cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase laid out its policy vision Wednesday, urging Congress to pass legislation that gives clarity for the digital assets industry and protects consumers.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Netflix is getting its first-ever English medical procedural series and a historical drama that looks like a Spanish Bridgerton
item.description: Netflix has announced its first English-language medical procedural series and a Spanish period drama that looks straight out of Bridgerton.
item.dc:creator: grace.morris@futurenet.com (Grace Morris), TechRadar

item.title: Venture Capital kills ‘more value than it creates,’ Bay Area author says
item.description: In a new book, World Eaters, tech activist Catherine Bracy says Silicon Valley needs to focus more on solving real-world problems and less on fast profit.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: A comprehensive look at DOGE’s firings and layoffs so far
item.description: Thousands of federal government employees have been shown the door in the first month of Trump’s administration.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Apple TV+ releases a gritty new crime drama trailer for Dope Thief that looks like a stylish version of The Wire
item.description: Apple TV+'s violent Philadelphia-set show has snagged the legendary Hollywood helmer and will start airing in March.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Grado's elite new open-back headphones feature huge 52mm drivers, and a beautiful walnut wood finish
item.description: The Brooklyn-based company’s latest flagship headphones look the part, and they should sound even better.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: GTA 6 could reach PCs in early 2026 according to Corsair – but I'm already sick of waiting
item.description: We still don't know exactly when GTA 6 will make its way to console, but there are already discussions of its PC launch - and it could come sooner rather than later.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: La estabilidad salarial marca el compás del sector tecnológico español
item.description: Tras alcanzar cierta estabilidad en 2023, el sector tecnológico continuó afianzándose el pasado 2024. Y es que tras algunos años de incrementos salariales superiores al 10%, los últimos doce meses las nóminas se mantuvieron constantes.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How to use asyncio: Python’s built-in async library
item.description: Python’s asynchronous programming functionality, or async for short, allows you to write programs that get more work done by not waiting for independent tasks to finish. The asyncio library is a set of tools included with Python for asynchronously processing disk or network I/O.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Intro to Elixir: A fresh take on functional programming
item.description: Elixir is one of the most interesting stories in the world of programming languages right now. Built on the Erlang ecosystem, Elixir offers a fresh take on functional programming and new ways of thinking about concurrency and fault tolerance.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Need a bodyguard? Now there’s an app for that
item.description: A new app makes hiring security as simple as ordering an Uber. A viral TikTok with 11.2 million views reads, “POV we just ordered bodyguards to pick us up from the airport.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Sea turtles return to the Atlantic Ocean off Florida after being stunned by the cold
item.description: Eight green sea turtles stunned by the cold during a rare snowfall in Florida have been released back into the Atlantic Ocean.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: These fantastic sites will save you from ever getting a bad seat again
item.description: When you’re booking travel, scoring a ticket to a sporting event, or securing yourself a spot at some other sort of show, you’re frequently faced with the impossible-seeming task of committing to a specific seat—on the spot. It may seem simple.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hoffman, Fast Company

item.title: Bannon: Musk 'wants to impose his freak experiments' on US
item.description: Former White House chief adviser turned conservative commentator Steve Bannon blasted billionaire Elon Musk over his efforts to reduce the size of the federal government and gain more power in the U.S. "Musk is a parasitic illegal immigrant," he said during an interview with the website UnHerd.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: Mexico presses case against Google over Gulf of America name change
item.description: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum accused Google on Monday of violating the country's sovereignty, leaving open the possibility of a lawsuit over the tech company labeling the Gulf of Mexico as the Gulf of America in its maps feature.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: DOGE says it has saved government $55B so far
item.description: The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) in a post on its website says it has found $55 billion in savings through a combination of efforts, including a reduction in the federal workforce.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Hundreds of heating complaints reveal how controversial $50 million energy savings project has left Mt. Diablo schools in the cold
item.description: As district administrators and watchdogs spar over Schneider Electric deal, teachers and students are dealing with the consequences
item.dc:creator: Katie Lauer, The Mercury News

item.title: Serverless was never a cure-all
item.description: An obituary for serverless computing might read something like this: In loving memory of serverless computing, born from the fervent hopes of developers and cloud architects alike.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: What changes to the CHIPS act could mean for AI growth and consumers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Even as he's vowed to push the United States ahead in artificial intelligence research, President Donald Trump's threats to alter federal government contracts with chipmakers and slap new tariffs on the semiconductor industry may put new speed bumps in front of the tech industry.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: OpenAI board unanimously rejects Elon Musk's $97.4 billion proposal
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — OpenAI says its board of directors has unanimously rejected a $97.4 billion takeover bid by Elon Musk. “OpenAI is not for sale, and the board has unanimously rejected Mr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: TikTok returns to Apple and Google app stores in the US
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — TikTok has returned to the app stores of Apple and Google in the U.S., after President Donald Trump delayed the enforcement of a TikTok ban. TikTok, which is operated by Chinese technology firm ByteDance, was removed from Apple and Google’s app stores on Jan.
item.dc:creator: ZEN SOO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Palo Alto Networks firewall bug being exploited by threat actors: Report
item.description: Admins with firewalls from Palo Alto Networks should make sure the devices are fully patched and the management interface blocked from open internet access after the discovery this week of a zero-day login authentication bypass in the PAN-OS operating system.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Buckle up for faster Python programs
item.description: In this edition of our biweekly Python newsletter: The next version of Python brings an all-new variety of speed boost. Python packages may soon pack better labeling for their ingredients. Cython 3.1 tees up new features for converting Python to C.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Scout Motors' effort to directly sell its electric SUVs where they'll make them stalls
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Legislation to let Volkswagen-backed Scout Motors sell its electric SUVs directly to people in South Carolina, where the vehicles will be built, has stalled after fierce opposition from traditional automobile dealers.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4
